overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from an Assassin's Creed game set in ancient Egypt. The player character walks along a desert trail at night, passing horses, NPCs, and a cart while surrounded by palm trees and rocky terrain under a starry sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert trail with scattered palm trees

events.description: character passes close to a horse and rider moving in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path through the desert landscape

notable_agents.action: riding a horse toward the player character, passing by on the left side of the trail

entered.detail: tall palm trees scattered along the trail against the night sky
rocky desert terrain rising on the left side of the path
rocky hillside with sparse vegetation on the right
sandy dirt path with wagon wheel ruts running through the center
stone ruins visible on the hillside in the distance

segments.scene_description: The player character walks along a desert trail at night, surrounded by rocky hills and date palm trees. A horse and rider approach from the opposite direction and pass by on the left, continuing down the trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert trail approaching a group of travelers

events.description: character passes a group of three NPCs walking on the right side of the trail

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path, approaching and passing a group of travelers

notable_agents.action: group of three travelers walking along the right side of the trail in the same direction as the player

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking through the open desert trail, passing a group of three NPCs traveling on the right side. The ancient ruins disappear from view behind the rocky terrain as the palm trees draw closer on the left.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a more densely vegetated section of the trail surrounded by palm trees

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a quieter stretch of the trail surrounded by numerous date palm trees on both sides. The rocky hills recede into the distance as the path continues through the open palm grove with no other travelers visible.

events.description: horse-drawn cart passes by on the right traveling in the opposite direction
large bird flies overhead from right to left

agents.ego_description: continuing along the trail, observing a passing cart and wildlife

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn cart with two horses traveling opposite direction, passing by on the right

entered.detail: carcass of a dead animal lying on the ground beside the trail

segments.scene_description: The character encounters a horse-drawn cart traveling in the opposite direction, which passes by on the right. Shortly after, a large bird flies overhead across the night sky, and the character approaches a dead animal lying beside the trail as the rocky terrain closes in on the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey along a desert trail at night, transitioning from an open rocky path into a dense palm grove before returning to a rugged landscape. It begins with the character walking past a horse and rider amidst rocky hills and date palms. As the character continues forward, the ruins fade behind the terrain and the camera passes a group of travelers on the right while the palm trees draw closer on the left. The scene then shifts into a quieter, secluded stretch of the trail where the rocky hills recede and the path is flanked on both sides by a thick grove of palms. Finally, the camera encounters a horse-drawn cart and a bird flying across the starry sky before approaching a dead animal as the rocky terrain closes back in on the left.
